name: Salesforce MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server for Salesforce CRM. Enables AI agents to run SOQL queries to explore and retrieve Salesforce data — inspecting records, fields, and relationships, listing metadata, and accessing Salesforce org data programmatically. Designed for sales operations agents and Salesforce data analysis workflows.
use_cases: Running SOQL queries against Salesforce data from sales operations agents
Inspecting Salesforce records, fields, and object relationships from development agents
Salesforce org metadata exploration from admin and development agents
Sales pipeline analysis and reporting from CRM analytics agents
not_for: Creating or modifying Salesforce records autonomously without human approval (read focus)
Salesforce Commerce Cloud or other Salesforce products beyond core CRM
best_when: A sales operations, RevOps, or development agent needs to query and analyze Salesforce data — exploring SOQL results, inspecting object metadata, and extracting CRM insights without direct Salesforce UI access.
avoid_when: You need write access to create/modify Salesforce records autonomously — verify the MCP's write capabilities and implement human approval gates for data modifications.

auth.notes: Salesforce Connected App with OAuth2 required. Consumer Key + Secret + username/password or OAuth flow. Use API-only profiles for agent connections.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Salesforce API included with Enterprise/Unlimited editions
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API access; Salesforce edition determines API availability
pricing.notes: Salesforce API access included with paid Salesforce editions. MCP server is free open source from kodey-ai.

performance.rate_limits: Salesforce API daily limits by edition (25K-unlimited calls/day)

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: CRM data contains customer PII — handle with appropriate data governance and consent tracking
Salesforce OAuth2 Connected App setup is complex — plan Connected App configuration and permissions carefully
Salesforce API limits vary by edition — Enterprise/Unlimited have more headroom than Professional
Community server (kodey-ai) — verify SOQL query support and metadata coverage for your Salesforce org
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer CRM data. OAuth2 Connected App auth. HTTPS. Use API-only Salesforce profiles with minimal permissions. CRM data subject to GDPR/CCPA.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRM PII data. OAuth2 Connected App. Minimal permissions profile. Data subject to regulatory requirements.
